scope_summary: Remove the forced redirect from /field-notes/living-slightly-out-of-sync to /field-notes/living-slightly-out-of-sync/ that was causing a self-redirect loop on the live site.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: Routing-only infrastructure fix with no policy or legal-surface changes.

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: No user-data collection, storage, or transmission behavior changed.
evidence: No backend or analytics code changes

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: No medical content or claims were modified.

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: No behavior-design or persuasion flow changed.

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: No research claims or ND content changed; routing fix only.

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users can access the Field Note page instead of getting stuck in repeated redirects.
evidence: Live verification showed repeated 301 responses for /field-notes/living-slightly-out-of-sync/
Local Netlify simulation after fix returns HTTP 200 for /field-notes/living-slightly-out-of-sync/

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: No copy, claims, or messaging were modified.

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: Fix restores access to the content URL and removes a blocking navigation failure.
evidence: Canonical article route no longer loops in local Netlify simulation

security_and_reliability.rationale: Redirect graph is simplified by removing a self-referential forced rule.
evidence: Deleted the forced redirect rule for /field-notes/living-slightly-out-of-sync
